title: WLLHYF Self-Adhesive Small Wall Hooks Clear Square Strong Shower Pothook Heavy Duty Waterproof for Kitchen Bathroom Office Door Window Hanging Hat Towel Picture (Style A- Fold Corners, 12)
features: 【Durable Material】The hooks for hanging are made of high-quality plastic, the adhesive wall hooks are durable and not easy to deform; the picture hanging hooks are not easy to fall off and can be used for a long time; the kitchen organizers and storage are waterproof and oil-proof, with heavy-duty adhesion

【Transparent design】The wall hooks for hanging adopts a transparent design, the bathroom accessories are invisible and beautiful, and look more simple and elegant, the dorm room essentials can be matched with any decoration style, and the closet organizer is very suitable for exquisite home decoration.

【Easy installation】The under sink organizer does not need nails or drilling, and the ceiling hooks are seamlessly glued. You only need to clean the wall you want to paste, then peel off the sticker on the back of the wall shelves, stick the shower shelves and squeeze out the air bubbles. . We recommend that you wait for 24 hours before using, the key holder for wall will be more sticky

【Multipurpose】The dorm room essentials for college students girls can be used on any smooth surface, such as ceramic, glass, stainless steel surface, door or metal coated furniture, etc. You can use over the door hooks to hang towels, keys, kitchen utensils, Toiletries, photos, hats, clothes, hair clips, etc.

【Product List】You will get 12 transparent sticky hooks for hanging, the size of the hat organizer is about 2.36 × 2.36 × 0.78 inches/6 × 6 × 2 cm. Adhesive wall hooks are small and exquisite enough to meet your daily use and replacement needs. Tips: Please do not use wall hooks adhesive on rough walls, painted walls and other chipped surfaces
description: Specific parameters Category: Hooks Color: Transparent Material: Plastic Function: waterproof, dustproof, bathroom hook, easy to use Product size: 2.36 × 2.36 × 0.78 inches/6 × 6 × 2 cm Packing method: Bag Packing list: 12pcs × hook Strong and sturdy The self adhesive hooks are durable and reusable, even the adhesive wall hooks will not fall off under the shower in the bathroom, and the adhesive hooks heavy duty has excellent waterproof and oil-proof performance, so you don't need to buy plastic hooks frequently. Adhesive ceiling hooks are suitable for various places such as kitchens, bedrooms, offices, etc. Plastic hooks for hanging bring you a lot of convenience
